segments.text: At T plus 0.678 seconds, the first warning appeared.

segments.text: That pressure matters.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: But the record does not support the easy folklore that outside political pressure or a State of the Union deadline caused the launch decision.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The stronger explanation is internal and more useful.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The program had built enough momentum, process, and confidence to keep a known risk moving through the normal work of launch.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That sequence is warning softening.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: A system does not have to forget danger to become vulnerable.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It can remember danger in a form that no longer controls behavior.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The next case, Therac-25, changes the mechanism.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Trust accumulates around a machine until trust itself becomes part of the hazard.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Challenger leaves the starting point for that question.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: How a system changes before consequence makes the change impossible to ignore.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
